flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Cornerstone University fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (97.4% → 78.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Cornerstone University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cornerstone University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Cornerstone University rose 21% between 2006 and 2009 (28.1% → 33.9%).
